name: Black Bean and Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked or canned black beans (rinse & drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the beans, rice, and cilantro together in a bowl.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the lime juice, oil, onion, and garlic.
3. Toss the mixture with the rice and beans.
4. Add salt and pepper to taste.
